Spin.units: Fallback to [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] as specific angular momentum cannot be reconstructed from unit vector without Rvir and Vvir.

synthetic_logic.SAGE_Mapping_Requirement: Synthetic Map (Requires temporal and FOF synthesis)
synthetic_logic.FOF_Requirement: Synthesize FirstHaloInFOFgroup and NextHaloInFOFgroup using hostHalo column. Subhalos link to host; missing hosts map subhalos to self.
synthetic_logic.Mass_Approximations: SAGE requires M_Mean200 and M_TopHat. Synthesized as direct clones of Mvir.
synthetic_logic.Pointer_Logic: Temporal NextProgenitor pointers synthesized by parsing parallel temporal linkages in _mtree files.
topology_warnings: pointer_description: Pointers do not exist natively and must be synthesized from temporal ID linkages. High risk of cyclic or dangling pointers.
id_uniqueness: Halo IDs must be globally unique across snapshots for temporal linking to succeed.
